data.title: AKVA group ASA invites to presentation of Q3 2025 financial results.
data.description: AKVA Group ASA is pleased to announce the upcoming presentation of its financial results for the third quarter of 2025. Shareholders and interested parties are cordially invited to attend the event.

data.title: Nanobiotix updates JNJ-1900 (NBTXR3) clinical program; transfers Phase 3 head and neck cancer trial, gains operational control.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, NANOBIOTIX, a leading biotechnology company based in Paris and Cambridge, Massachusetts, shared updates on the JNJ-1900 (NBTXR3) clinical development program. The Company, listed on Euronext under the ticker symbol NANO and on NASDAQ under NBTX, focuses on utilizing physics-based methods to advance treatment options for patients dealing with cancer and various other serious illnesses. This update signifies significant progress in the late-stage clinical trials conducted by NANOBIOTIX.

data.title: Texaf reports quarterly earnings with profits up by 15% to $500 million.
data.description: In the latest update on the economic situation, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, with the creation of 250,000 new jobs in the past month. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant increase, with the S&P 500 reaching a record high of 4,500 points. The growing employment opportunities and positive market performance indicate a strengthening economy, offering hope for continued growth in the coming months.

data.title: 49,164 Orion Corp A shares have been converted into B shares as of Oct 24, 2025.
data.description: Orion Corporation has released additional information as per the regulations of the Stock Exchange on 24 October 2025 at 9:00 EEST.

data.title: Hiab's profits in January-September 2025 impacted by reduced US sales, highlighting lower profitability.
data.description: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.1%, with 1.8 million new jobs created in the last quarter. The stock market has also seen a significant increase, with the main index rising by 8% in the last month. Additionally, the government announced a budget surplus of $25 billion for the current fiscal year.

data.title: JLT Mobile Computers AB releases interim report for Jan-Sep 2025, main headquarters located in Vaxjo, Sweden.
data.description: In Växjö, Sweden, on October 24, 2025, JLT Mobile Computers, a top provider of rugged computers for challenging settings, releases its interim report for January - September 2025.

data.title: AS Tallinna Vesi to host webinar introducing Q3 2025 results. Shareholders, investors, analysts invited.
data.description: AS Tallinna Vesi is extending an invitation to shareholders, investors, analysts, and stakeholders to participate in an investor conference webinar. The webinar will focus on presenting the financial results for the third quarter and first nine months of the year 2025.

data.title: Afarak Group released Q3 2025 production report, trading (LSE: AFRK, NASDAQ: AFAGR). Time for release mentioned.
data.description: At 07:00 in London and 09:00 in Helsinki on October 24, 2025, Afarak Group SE, also known as Afarak, announced its latest updates. The company is listed on the London Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol AFRK and on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AFAGR.

data.title: Duni Group's Board sets new targets from 2026 with increased growth and sustainability focus.
data.description: In Malmö, Sweden, as of October 24, 2025, the Board of Directors at Duni Group sanctioned new financial and sustainability objectives, set to commence in January 2026. These updated targets showcase a heightened focus on growth, a modified dividend strategy, and an increased emphasis on sustainability initiatives.

data.title: Cathie Wood backs Japan's first institutional-grade ETH treasury firm, Quantum Solutions, as largest corporate ETH holder.
data.description: Founder Cathie Wood of Ark Invest expressed support for Quantum Solutions, the largest Ethereum-focused cryptocurrency treasury company outside the U.S., on Thursday. Wood mentioned being "thrilled" to endorse Japan's premier ETH treasury firm, as stated by CEO Francis B. Zhou. She emphasized the importance of broadening innovation access in global capital markets and praised the collaboration with Quantum Solutions. The exact investment amount and stake percentage were not disclosed. Wood also noted her happiness in supporting Japan's inaugural institutional-grade ETH Distributed Autonomous Treasury (DAT) three months into the DAT revolution. The full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Faraday Future partners with RAK Motors in UAE for FX Super One. RAK Motors will handle sales and after-sales services.
data.description: In Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates on October 23, 2025, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI), a California-based global intelligent electric mobility company, revealed a collaboration with RAK Motors, an automotive dealer in Ras Al Khaimah. RAK Motors will handle sales, delivery, and after-sales services for the FX Super One in the UAE region.

data.title: Munters Group AB reports strong performance, completes divestment of FoodTech Equipment. Order intake increased in July-September.
data.description: In KISTA, Sweden, the completion of the divestment of the FoodTech Equipment offering was announced on October 24, 2025. The details and numbers provided in this announcement pertain to ongoing operations unless specified otherwise. For further details, interested parties are advised to refer to pages 16-17 of the report. Notably, in the period from July to September, there was a rise in order intake...

data.title: Saab reports strong Q3 2025 results, showcasing growth in all areas amid high market demand, upgrading outlook.
data.description: Saab announced their January-September 2025 results, showing strong growth in all business areas in the third quarter. With high market demand, the company upgraded their outlook due to a robust backlog and successful execution. The report indicates positive performance continuing into the year, reflecting promising numbers for the company in 2025.
Wendel's Q3 2025 NAV per share hits €163.0, marking a significant step in its business model shift.
WENDEL: Wendel in talks with Committed Advisors for exclusive partnership, aiming to strengthen their collaboration.

data.title: Sivers Semiconductors AB had a strong Q3 2025 with a new partnership and successful capital raise for R&D. Stock: SIVE.
data.description: A successful quarter was highlighted by a new strategic partnership, key leadership appointments, product expansion, and a prosperous capital raise to support research and market growth. Sivers Semiconductors AB, based in KISTA, Sweden, reported these achievements on Oct. 24, 2025. The company, listed on the Stockholmsborsen exchange under the ticker symbol SIVE, is renowned for its expertise in photonics and wireless technology.

data.title: Altseason potential grows as altcoin season may approach with liquidity moving to risk assets. However, indicators remain low at bear market levels.
data.description: Analysts in the cryptocurrency industry anticipate the onset of the altcoin season as liquidity moves towards higher-risk assets. However, indicators signaling the altseason are currently reported to be at their lowest levels seen in bear markets.

data.title: Custodia Bank and Vantage Bank introduce platform to tokenize deposits, bringing blockchain benefits while securing customer funds.
data.description: Custodia Bank has introduced a new solution allowing banks to tokenize deposits. This initiative enables banks to capitalize on blockchain technology's benefits while securing customer deposits.
